description: Booklist in Judaeo-Arabic listing individual Epistles of the Brethren of Purity. Booklist. E.g., "Third: Epistle elucidating the beliefs of the Brethren of Purity and the sects of the holy divines (madhāhib al-rabbāniyyīn al-ilāhiyyīn; this probably does not refer to Rabbanites). Fourth: Epistle on the methods of the community of the Brethren of Purity and Friends [of Loyalty]...." It continues with "[Fifth]" and "Sixth" on verso. ASE
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
